channel.title: Posts on FIRAT YAMAN | Personal Website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on FIRAT YAMAN | Personal Website

item.title: How to Use Built-in Gemini Nano on Chrome
item.description: 1. What is Embedded Gemini Nano? Google’s Gemini Nano is a LLM model for on-device tasks. It is a lightweight AI model which can process images, voice and text. Currently it is being used in some Google products such as Gboard, Talkback and Pixel Recorder. Chrome recently published a beta version of Chrome which you can experience by installing Chrome Canary version. In this version they added an embedded version of Gemini Nano.

item.title: Welcome to my blog
item.description: Hello Everyone! This is my first ever personal blog post! During my lifetime I was always a lazy person when it comes to writing. I got easily distracted and get bored while writing long paragraphs. The vast majority of my written outputs are quick notes, messaging and short e-mails. I decided to break my lifelong habit and write down the things in a nicely shaped blog posts. There are some motivations behind this.
